data.title: ‘Biggest crypto hack in history’: Bybit exploit is latest security blow to industry
data.description:
The Bybit hack is more than twice as large as the second-largest crypto exploit, which belongs to Ronin Network.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/biggest-crypto-hack-history-bybit-exploit-security-blo?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: North Korea’s Lazarus Group exposed as the group behind Bybit hack
data.description:
Bybit got ripped apart by hackers today, and now we know exactly who did it. The infamous Lazarus Group, North Korea’s state-backed cybercriminal syndicate, has been exposed as the masterminds behind the $1.5 billion Bybit exploit, which is the largest crypto theft in history. The confirmation came from ZachXBT, one of the most respected on-chain […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/north-koreas-lazarus-group-exposed-as-the-group-behind-bybit-hack/

data.title: ZachXBT identifies Lazarus Group as behind Bybit $1.4B hack, wins Arkham bounty
data.description:
After the Bybit exchange was hacked for over $1.4 billion, the crypto community on X reacted with support and security advice for users.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/zach-xbt-identifies-lazarus-group-bybit-hack-arkham-bounty?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase CEO’s Hot Take: Bitcoin Is Basically A ‘Meme Coin’
data.description:
Brian Armstrong, the CEO of Coinbase, has recently made an audacious statement regarding Bitcoin that has caused quite a stir in the crypto industry. He recently proposed that Bitcoin could be regarded as “somewhat of a meme coin,” which sparked a debate among enthusiasts, analysts, and investors. Related Reading: XRP Bulls Return—Will This Be the Breakout to $3? The Power Of Collective Belief...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/coinbase-ceos-hot-take-bitcoin-is-basically-a-meme-coin/

However, […]
The post Altcoins Primed for a Massive...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/21/altcoins-primed-for-a-massive-pump-from-current-level-according-to-crypto-analyst-but-theres-a-catch/

data.title: Binance, Bitget transfer over 50,000 ETH to Bybit cold wallets
data.description:
Today, Bybit experienced a massive hack from Lazarus Group that wiped out 400,000 ETH worth around $1.5 billion from its cold wallets today and shortly after said it was gonna get some loans to settle users. An hour after that, Binance and Bitget stepped in, sending over 50,000 ETH straight into Bybit’s wallets, effectively acting as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-bitget-transfer-over-50000-eth-to-bybit-cold-wallets/

data.title: White House and US Treasury rein in D.O.G.E’s access to IRS systems
data.description:
The White House and Treasury Department have officially shut down D.O.G.E’s access to sensitive IRS tax data today. According to a report from Politico, the agreement came through a memorandum of understanding designed to block D.O.G.E from getting their hands on individual taxpayer records. The decision comes after weeks of growing outrage in Washington, where […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/white-house-and-us-treasury-rein-in-d-o-g-es-access-to-irs-systems/
